steps.name: Initiate Redemption
steps.description: Customer initiates a point redemption request at the Point of Sale (POS).

steps.name: Validate Balance
steps.description: CRM system validates if the customer has a sufficient point balance.

steps.name: Process Redemption
steps.description: CRM deducts the points from the customer's account and logs the transaction.
actions: Create a 'redemption' transaction in the loyalty_points table.

steps.name: Send Confirmation
steps.description: CRM sends a success confirmation back to the POS terminal.

steps.name: Send Rejection
steps.description: CRM sends a rejection message back to the POS terminal due to insufficient points.
actions: Return a 422 Unprocessable Entity HTTP response.

steps.name: Post Financial Liability
steps.description: CRM dispatches an event to notify the FINA module of the loyalty liability change.
